_comment: OPTIONAL. Copy this file to install-answers.json and fill in your values for a zero-prompt install. Delete (or leave blank) any value you'd rather be asked for interactively. Keys map 1:1 to Install-DSMT.ps1 parameters.
_required: These four are the only things the installer truly needs:
_optional: Everything below has a sensible default - set only what you need:
_switches: Set any of these to true to skip that stage:
_security_note: Putting a password in this file stores it in PLAIN TEXT. Leave LocalAdminPassword blank to be prompted securely instead, and delete this file after the install.
